name: Astro fleet
description:
A powerful alien force of toilet like creatures. They got extreme speed and spacecraft technologies. They got laser cannons and they got energy blades and energy shields.

There are different astro troops:

Astro soldier - a big highly armored toilet with 2 laser pistols they are extremely fast and can taran their enemies.

Big astro soldier: they are a slightly bigger version of normal astro solders but have 2 hands on 1 is gigantic laser canon and on the other one an energy shield.

Astro strider- a strider of astro fleet have 2 versions big and normal one both have a big core/drill and can shoot lasers.

Astro destroyer: a large bomber like unit that has a lot of armor and can shoot lasers from 4 cannons.

Astro carrier- a massive flying unit that carries smaller astro troops , can attack with 2 massive lasers and it has massive claw that can possess anything that has a core.

Interceptor astro: a small flying unit that has an X wing form and has 2 large laser guns that can shoot nom stop with energy blasts

Astro destructor- a large air unit capable of destruction of big targets it has a core, 4 laser cannons, and 2 speed up jets

Astro toilets also have unique units such as astro carrier and

Astro UFO- a small astro that is commanding most of the astro fleet he has a large laser gun in the button of it's corpus and it easily dodges targets and can block teleports

Astro juggernaut- a massive air unit that can destroy small town he has a gigantic laser cannon capable of destroying multiple gigant targets at once , he has 2 hands that are giving him ability to grab and punch targets, he has a nearly unbearable energy shield, he is insanely strong and fast

Astro scorpion- a large air unit he has 3 claws that can reflect any laser or energy, they can turn into chains allowing him to break shields, they can also turn into blades if a close attack is needed

Astro Duchess- a large unit capable of destroying 20 targets at the same time

Astro mothership- a Gigantic unit that is capable of destroying cities.

They destroyed countless planets conquered countless worlds and will continue to
creator: Aboba 228
